title: First report of northern root-knot nematode on strawberry in Turkey
author: Özarslandan, Adem
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Figure 2: PCR product at 440 bp using species-specific SCAR primers (JMV1, JMV2 and JMVhapla). M: 100 bp molecular size marker, 1,2 and 3: larvae from field infected samples. +k: positive control and –k: negative control.
